scripts.dev: sh -c 'PYTHON_BIN=.venv/bin/python; if [ ! -x "$PYTHON_BIN" ]; then PYTHON_BIN=python; fi; exec "$PYTHON_BIN" -m uvicorn src.api.app:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port ${PORT:-8000}'
scripts.start: sh -c 'PYTHON_BIN=.venv/bin/python; if [ ! -x "$PYTHON_BIN" ]; then PYTHON_BIN=python; fi; exec "$PYTHON_BIN" -m uvicorn src.api.app:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port ${PORT:-8000}'
